background: In a clinical trial in which a total of 100 patients are allocated to two treatments by simple randomization.

task.query: Show that the probability that the difference between the numbers of patients in the two treatment groups exceeds 20 is about $5 \%$. (Hint: consider the distribution of the number of patients allocated to one of the groups.)
task.answer: Another way of phrasing the question is, 'What is the probability of the number in one group being less than 40 or more than $60 ?$
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
